subject: [PATCH v3 08/10] fuse: support registered buffers as buffer pools in io-uring

2026-06-02.patch_summary: This patch adds support for registered buffers as buffer pools in io-uring, allowing servers to use an io-uring registered buffer as the buffer pool and eliminating the overhead of pinning/unpinning user pages per i/o request. Registered buffers require enabling the FUSE_URING_BUFPOOL flag and setting the FUSE_URING_REGISTERED_BUFFERS init flag during registration. The patch also includes benchmark results showing a 10% throughput improvement for direct randreads, a 4% improvement for direct sequential reads, an 8% improvement for buffered randreads, and a 6% improvement for buffered sequential reads.
